description: Use this API to specify or return the value of the PSSE size level option setting to a multiple of 1,000 between 1,000 and 200,000. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = bus_size_level(ival) ierr, ival = bus_size_level()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 1000 by default; else output).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
unable to change bus size. PSSE Xplore is limited to 50 buses.
